headline: OPEC+ extends deep production cuts until end of 2024
description: The oil cartel agreed to keep 2 million bpd off the market to support flagging prices.

headline: U.S. crude inventories rise unexpectedly by 5 million barrels
description: EIA reports a massive build in commercial crude stocks, surprising analysts who expected a draw.

headline: Houthi rebels strike oil tanker in Red Sea
description: Shipping companies reroute vessels around Africa following another attack on a commercial tanker.

headline: China's economic growth slows to 4.5% amid property slump
description: The world's largest oil importer shows signs of prolonged economic weakness, raising demand concerns.

headline: Federal Reserve holds interest rates steady
description: The central bank decided not to hike rates, providing some relief to equity markets.

headline: Saudi Arabia slashes official selling price for Asian buyers
description: The Kingdom aggressively cut prices for its flagship Arab Light crude, signaling weak demand.

headline: Libya announces an immediate halt to all oil production and exports
description: Rival political factions clash over control of the central bank, taking 1.2m bpd offline.

headline: New solar and wind capacity breaks records in Europe
description: Renewable generation outpaced fossil fuels for the first time across the continent.

headline: Hurricane shuts down Gulf of Mexico refineries
description: Major refining hubs offline, though offshore crude platforms remain largely untouched.

headline: IEA revises global oil demand forecast upward
description: The agency expects robust summer travel to drain global inventories faster than anticipated.
